pages.text: Abstract. This paper proposes a compact document-to-slide workflow. Introduction. Existing workflows lose figures and tables.
Method. The system extracts multimodal evidence and generates a structured intermediate state.

captions.text: Fig. 1. Overview of the document-to-slide architecture.
